# go.gh05t.cc — production deploy

**Do not edit files in this repository manually.**

This public repo is auto-deployed from the private **`GH05T-Labs/gh05t-share-src`** repository via GitHub Actions on every push to `main`.

| | |
|---|---|
| **Live site** | [https://go.gh05t.cc/](https://go.gh05t.cc/) |
| **Source repo** | `gh05t-share-src` (private) |
| **Deploy** | GitHub Action → minified `dist/` output |

To change the landing page, edit `src/index.html` in the **private** source repo and push to `main`.
